creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
There is new patch-level version of phpldapadmin. It was released on
20th Sep 2009 as bug-fix. It was released because there is no possibility to
create new objects under new created ones (i.e. organizationalUnit). PLA crew
released new version number is 1.2.0.4 which is free of this bug.

Fix: I've just tested this application on my server. It seems work correctly. So
there is patches to add to Makefile and distinfo files.

----------------------- cut here -----------------------
----------------------- cut here -----------------------


Greetings from Poland
--
Krzysztof Stryjek--F32iZEBUFQidgcJs0vsYWGhYKD9SMrtO0ZanGbtlJEpT05td
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile	2009-09-10 05:12:50.000000000 +0200
+++ Makefile.1204	2009-11-24 00:33:09.000000000 +0100
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	phpldapadmin
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.0.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.0.4
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	net www
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}-php5/${PORTVERSION}
----------------------- cut here -----------------------
How-To-Repeat: 	cd net/phpldapadmin && make all install
